series_metadata.series_description: This retention schedule consists of, but is not limited to, applications or correspondence related to burial permits. Applications may contain confidential information like social security numbers. Social security numbers are confidential pursuant to State ex rel Beacon Journal Publishing Co v. Kent State, 68 Ohio St. 3d 40, 43.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Records maintained in paper form may be imaged and indexed a machine readable format. Upon confirmation that paper record is imaged and indexed properly, paper record shall be destroyed. ; Electronic: records maintained in machine readable format, records shall be maintained four years from date of receipt by Division. ; Microform: any records maintained in microfiche, records shall be maintained four years from date of receipt by Division
retention_rules.disposition_method: Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase ; Microform: Shred
